title: Launching Sora responsibly
titleZh: 负责任地推出Sora
summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
summaryZh: 为了应对最先进的视频模式以及新的社交创作平台带来的新型安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的Sora 2和Sora应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护措施为基础。
highlights: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the fou
Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
highlightsZh: 为了应对最先进的视频模式以及新的社交创作平台带来的新型安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的Sora 2和Sora应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护措施为基础。

title: Sora 2 System Card
titleZh: Sora 2系统卡
summary: Sora 2 is our new state of the art video and audio generation model. Building on the foundation of Sora, this new model introduces capabilities that have been difficult for prior video models to achieve– such as more accurate physics, sharper realism, synchronized audio, enhanced steerability, and an expanded stylistic
summaryZh: Sora 2是我们最新的视频和音频生成模型。在Sora的基础上，这种新模型引入了以前的视频模型难以实现的功能，例如更准确的物理、更清晰的真实感、同步的音频、增强的可操纵性和扩展的风格
highlights: Sora 2 is our new state of the art video and audio generation model.
Building on the foundation of Sora, this new model introduces capabilities that have been difficult for prior video models to achieve– such as more accurate physics, sharper realis

title: Sora 2 is here
titleZh: Sora 2来了
summary: Our latest video generation model is more physically accurate, realistic, and controllable than prior systems. It also features synchronized dialogue and sound effects. Create with it in the new Sora app.
summaryZh: 与之前的系统相比，我们最新的视频生成模型在物理上更准确、更逼真、更可控。它还具有同步对话和音效。在新的Sora应用程序中使用它进行创建。
highlights: Our latest video generation model is more physically accurate, realistic, and controllable than prior systems.
It also features synchronized dialogue and sound effects.
highlightsZh: 与之前的系统相比，我们最新的视频生成模型在物理上更准确、更逼真、更可控。它还具有同步对话和音效。在新的Sora应用程序中使用它进行创建。

title: Building OpenAI with OpenAI
titleZh: 使用OpenAI构建OpenAI
summary: At OpenAI, we rely on our own technology to help streamline work, scale expertise, and drive outcomes. In our new series, OpenAI on OpenAI, we share lessons to help other organizations do the same.

highlights: At OpenAI, we rely on our own technology to help streamline work, scale expertise, and drive outcomes.
In our new series, OpenAI on OpenAI, we share lessons to help other organizations do the same.

title: Introducing ChatGPT Pulse
titleZh: ChatGPT Pulse简介
summary: Today we're releasing a preview of ChatGPT Pulse to Pro users on mobile. Pulse is a new experience where ChatGPT proactively does research to deliver personalized updates based on your chats, feedback, and connected apps like your calendar.
summaryZh: 今天，我们将在移动设备上向专业用户发布ChatGPT Pulse的预览版。Pulse是一种全新的体验， ChatGPT主动进行研究，根据您的聊天、反馈和连接的应用程序（如日历）提供个性化更新。

title: Detecting and reducing scheming in AI models
titleZh: 检测和减少人工智能模型中的计划
summary: Apollo Research and OpenAI developed evaluations for hidden misalignment (“scheming”) and found behaviors consistent with scheming in controlled tests across frontier models. The team shared concrete examples and stress tests of an early method to reduce scheming.
summaryZh: Apollo Research和OpenAI开发了隐藏错位（ “阴谋” ）的评估，并发现了与跨边界模型的受控测试中的阴谋一致的行为。该团队分享了减少计划的早期方法的具体例子和压力测试。
highlights: Apollo Research and OpenAI developed evaluations for hidden misalignment (“scheming”) and found behaviors consistent with scheming in controlled tests across frontier models.
The team shared concrete examples and stress tests of an early method to reduce scheming.
highlightsZh: Apollo Research和OpenAI开发了隐藏错位（ “阴谋” ）的评估，并发现了与跨边界模型的受控测试中的阴谋一致的行为。该团队分享了减少计划的早期方法的具体例子和压力测试。

title: How people are using ChatGPT
titleZh: 人们如何使用ChatGPT
summary: New research from the largest study of ChatGPT use shows how the tool creates economic value through both personal and professional use. Adoption is broadening beyond early users, closing gaps and making AI a part of everyday life.
summaryZh: 来自ChatGPT使用的最大研究的新研究表明，该工具如何通过个人和专业使用创造经济价值。采用范围正在扩大到早期用户之外，缩小了差距，使人工智能成为日常生活的一部分。

title: A People-First AI Fund: $50M to support nonprofits
titleZh: 以人为本的人工智能基金： 5000万$用于支持非营利组织
summary: Applications are now open for OpenAI’s People-First AI Fund, a $50M initiative supporting U.S. nonprofits advancing education, community innovation, and economic opportunity. Apply by October 8, 2025, for unrestricted grants that help communities shape AI for the public good.
summaryZh: OpenAI的“以人为本的人工智能基金” （ People-First AI Fund ）现已开放申请，该基金是一项耗资5000万美元的计划，旨在支持美国非营利组织推进教育、社区创新和经济机会。请在2025年10月8日前申请无限制补助金，帮助社区为公共利益塑造人工智能。

title: OpenAI and Greek Government launch ‘OpenAI for Greece’
titleZh: OpenAI和希腊政府推出“OpenAI for Greece”
summary: OpenAI and the Greek Government have launched “OpenAI for Greece” to bring ChatGPT Edu into secondary schools and support responsible AI learning. This partnership aims to boost AI literacy, fuel local start-ups, and drive national economic growth.
summaryZh: OpenAI和希腊政府已经推出了“OpenAI for Greece” ，将ChatGPT Edu带入中学，并支持负责任的人工智能学习。这一伙伴关系旨在提高人工智能素养，推动当地初创企业的发展，并推动国家经济增长。

This partnership aims to boost AI literacy, fuel local start-ups, and drive national economic growth.
